---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Wheel model**
- [ ] G29
- [ ] G923 PS/PC
- [ ] G923 Xbox

**Environment**
- OS: Windows [e.g. 11 24H2]
- App version: [e.g. v1.0.3 — visible in tray right-click › About]
- G HUB installed: Yes / No
- Forza version: [e.g. FH6]

**Steps to reproduce**
1. ...
2. ...

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behaviour**
What actually happened. Include any error messages or balloon notifications from the tray icon.

**Additional context**
Any other relevant info (other wheel software running, antivirus, etc.).
